name: UBA : Initial Access Followed by Suspicious Activity
notes: Detects the scenario of phishing or malware activity followed by suspicious access activity within 24hrs.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Execution match at least 1 times with the same Username in 24 hour(s) after BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Initial Access match
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Execution match at least 1 times with the same Username in 24 hour(s) after BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Initial Access match
thresholds: when BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Execution match at least 1 times with the same Username in 24 hour(s) after BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Initial Access match
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Initial Access Followed by Suspicious Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Execution match at least 1 times with the same Username in 24 hour(s) after BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Initial Access match
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Initial Access Followed by Suspicious Activity
